TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_panay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw ira ku penaluma' nira tu ccay a kilang tu cihaciay tu enem u nasi.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ira ku pənaɾumaʡ nira tu ʦʦaj a kiɾaŋ tu ʦiħaʦiaj tu ənəm u nasi.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw ira ku penaluma' nira tu ccay a kilang tu cihaciay tu enem u nasi.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw ira ku pənaɾumaʡ nira tu ʦʦaj a kiɾaŋ tu ʦiħaʦiaj tu ənəm u nasi.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人他種了一棵樹,長出六顆梨子的樹.
There was a person planting a tree, which bore six pears.

S.FORM: mipitpit cingra tu nasi nira.
S.PHON: mipitpit ʦiŋra tu nasi nira.
S.FORM: mipitpit cingra tu nasi nira.
S.PHON: mipitpit ʦiŋra tu nasi nira.
S.TRANSL: 他去摘梨子.
He plucked pears.

S.FORM: mikalic cingra i fafa'ed tata'angtu kuya kilang nira.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ ʦiŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ tataʡaŋtu kuja kiɾaŋ nira.
S.FORM: mikalic cingra i fafa'ed tata'angtu kuya kilang nira.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ ʦiŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ tataʡaŋtu kuja kiɾaŋ nira.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上去,那棵樹長得很大棵.
He climbed up. The tree grew tall.

S.FORM: mikalic cingra i fafa'ed pakawal han nira a mi kalic.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ ʦiŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ pakawaɾ ħan nira a mi kaɾiʦ.
S.FORM: mikalic cingra i fafa'ed pakawal han nira a mi kalic.
S.PHON: mikaɾiʦ ʦiŋra i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ pakawaɾ ħan nira a mi kaɾiʦ.

TRANSL.notes: 他爬上去(的時候),用樓梯爬上去.

S.TRANSL: 他爬上去 ,用樓梯爬上去.
He climbed up. He climbed up with a ladder.

S.FORM: adihaytu kuya ni pitpitan nira.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħajtu kuja ni pitpitan nira.
S.FORM: adihaytu kuya ni pitpitan nira.
S.PHON: aɬ~ɮiħajtu kuja ni pitpitan nira.
S.TRANSL: 他摘的果實多了.
What he plucked were numerous.

S.FORM: ma'pud cingra miteli tulu ku langa nira i la'enu.
S.PHON: maʡpuɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra mitəɾi tuɾu ku ɾaŋa nira i ɾaʡənu.
S.FORM: ma'pud cingra miteli tulu ku langa nira i la'enu.
S.PHON: maʡpuɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra mitəɾi tuɾu ku ɾaŋa nira i ɾaʡənu.
S.TRANSL: 他下來了,要放置在下面的三個籃子.

TRANSL.notes: He went down to put (the pears) in the three baskets below.

S.TRANSL: He went down to put in the three baskets below.

S.FORM: matumustu ku tusa a langa.
S.PHON: matumustu ku tusa a ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: matumustu ku tusa a langa.
S.PHON: matumustu ku tusa a ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 兩個籃子都裝滿了.
Two baskets were full.

S.FORM: miliyaw haca cingra a mikalic mipitpit i fafa'ed ku.
S.PHON: miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ mipitpit i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ku.
S.FORM: miliyaw haca cingra a mikalic mipitpit i fafa'ed ku.
S.PHON: miɾijaw ħaʦa ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ mipitpit i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ku.
S.TRANSL: 他再次爬上去,在上面摘.

TRANSL.notes: He climbed up again to pluck (fruit) up there.

S.TRANSL: He climbed up again to pluck up there.

S.FORM: takaraw kura kilang i fafa'ed cingra a mikalic.
S.PHON: takaraw kura kiɾaŋ i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ.
S.FORM: takaraw kura kilang i fafa'ed cingra a mikalic.
S.PHON: takaraw kura kiɾaŋ i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra a mikaɾiʦ.
S.TRANSL: 那棵樹很高,他爬到上面.
The tree was tall, and he climbed up.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw mi kitingay tu siri.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mi kitiŋaj tu siri.
S.FORM: ira ku ccay a tamdaw mi kitingay tu siri.
S.PHON: ira ku ʦʦaj a tamɬ~ɮaw mi kitiŋaj tu siri.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人牽著山羊.
There was a person who pulled a goat along.

S.FORM: tayra a mi ra'ud nengnenghan nira u nasi kuya mipitpitan patiku'.
S.PHON: tajra a mi raʡuɬ~ɮ nəŋnəŋħan nira u nasi kuja mipitpitan patikuʡ.
S.FORM: tayra a mi ra'ud nengnenghan nira u nasi kuya mipitpitan patiku'.
S.PHON: tajra a mi raʡuɬ~ɮ nəŋnəŋħan nira u nasi kuja mipitpitan patikuʡ.

TRANSL.notes: 他靠近然後看了,(原來是)摘下來的梨子,就放了回去.

S.TRANSL: 他靠近然後看了, 摘下來的梨子,就放了回去.
He went and approached, seeing the plucked pears. He put them back.

S.FORM: huni ira ku ccay a wawa tu nikiliciway mitafsiw itira.
S.PHON: ħuni ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa tu nikiɾiʦiwaj mitafsiw itira.
S.FORM: huni ira ku ccay a wawa tu nikiliciway mitafsiw itira.
S.PHON: ħuni ira ku ʦʦaj a wawa tu nikiɾiʦiwaj mitafsiw itira.
S.TRANSL: 一會兒,有一個小孩騎著單車,從那裡經過.
After a while, there was a child who rode a bike and passed by.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira ira i fafa'ed kuya tamdaw mipitpit.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira ira i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ kuja tamɬ~ɮaw mipitpit.
S.FORM: nengnenghan nira ira i fafa'ed kuya tamdaw mipitpit.
S.PHON: nəŋnəŋħan nira ira i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ kuja tamɬ~ɮaw mipitpit.

TRANSL.notes: 他一看,那個人在上面摘(水果).

S.TRANSL: 他一看,那個人在上面摘 .

TRANSL.notes: He saw a person plucking (fruit) above.

S.TRANSL: He saw a person plucking above.

S.FORM: ca'ahan nira mica'a ca'ay pinengneng pasila'enu kuya tamdaw.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaħan nira miʦaʡa ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ pasiɾaʡənu kuja tamɬ~ɮaw.
S.FORM: ca'ahan nira mica'a ca'ay pinengneng pasila'enu kuya tamdaw.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaħan nira miʦaʡa ʦaʡaj pinəŋnəŋ pasiɾaʡənu kuja tamɬ~ɮaw.

TRANSL.notes: 他抬頭仰望,那個(摘果樹的)人都不往下看.

S.TRANSL: 他抬頭仰望,那個 人都不往下看.

TRANSL.notes: He raised his head, and (saw) that person (the person who was plucking fruit) did not look down.

S.TRANSL: He raised his head, and that person did not look down.

S.FORM: ya mikuliciway satu a wawa nengnenghan nira kuya nasi itira i langa.
S.PHON: ja mikuɾiʦiwaj satu a wawa nəŋnəŋħan nira kuja nasi itira i ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: ya mikuliciway satu a wawa nengnenghan nira kuya nasi itira i langa.
S.PHON: ja mikuɾiʦiwaj satu a wawa nəŋnəŋħan nira kuja nasi itira i ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 而後,騎著腳踏車的小孩,他看著在籃子裡的梨子.
The child that rode a bike looked at the pears in the baskets.

S.FORM: alahan nira miala ku ccay a langa pakalic itira i kuliciw nira.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nira miaɾa ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa pakaɾiʦ itira i kuɾiʦiw nira.
S.FORM: alahan nira miala ku ccay a langa pakalic itira i kuliciw nira.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nira miaɾa ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa pakaɾiʦ itira i kuɾiʦiw nira.
S.TRANSL: 他拿走了一籃裝上他的腳踏車.
He took one basket and put it on his bike.

S.FORM: ca'ay kanengneng nuya tamdaw tuya mikalicay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kanəŋnəŋ nuja tamɬ~ɮaw tuja mikaɾiʦaj.
S.FORM: ca'ay kanengneng nuya tamdaw tuya mikalicay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj kanəŋnəŋ nuja tamɬ~ɮaw tuja mikaɾiʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 爬到上面的人沒有看到.
The person who climbed up did not see this.

S.FORM: samaanen i fafa'ed cingra a mipitpit.
S.PHON: samaanən i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra a mipitpit.
S.FORM: samaanen i fafa'ed cingra a mipitpit.
S.PHON: samaanən i fafaʡəɬ~ɮ ʦiŋra a mipitpit.

TRANSL.notes: 那有什麼辦法呢,(因為)他在上面摘嘛.

S.TRANSL: 那有什麼辦法呢, 他在上面摘嘛.

TRANSL.notes: He couldn't do anything. He was plucking (fruit) above.

S.TRANSL: He couldn't do anything. He was plucking above.

S.FORM: alahan nuya wawa tu fa'inayan nikuliciway ku ccay a langa.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nuja wawa tu faʡinajan nikuɾiʦiwaj ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: alahan nuya wawa tu fa'inayan nikuliciway ku ccay a langa.
S.PHON: aɾaħan nuja wawa tu faʡinajan nikuɾiʦiwaj ku ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 那個騎單車的男孩拿走了一籃.
The boy who rode a bike took one basket.

S.FORM: kuliciw satu cingra mi nukay.
S.PHON: kuɾiʦiw satu ʦiŋra mi nukaj.
S.FORM: kuliciw satu cingra mi nukay.
S.PHON: kuɾiʦiw satu ʦiŋra mi nukaj.
S.TRANSL: 他就騎著單車回家.
He rode his bike home.

S.FORM: tahira i ra'ay ira masalitemuk nira ku ccay a fafahiyan a mikuliciway.
S.PHON: taħira i raʡaj ira masaɾitəmuk nira ku ʦʦaj a fafaħijan a mikuɾiʦiwaj.
S.FORM: tahira i ra'ay ira masalitemuk nira ku ccay a fafahiyan a mikuliciway.
S.PHON: taħira i raʡaj ira masaɾitəmuk nira ku ʦʦaj a fafaħijan a mikuɾiʦiwaj.
S.TRANSL: 不遠處和他一位騎著腳踏車的女孩子交會了.
Somewhere not far away, he met one girl who rode a bike.

S.FORM: malalitemuk cangra mafiyuk nu fali nu kalalitemuk nira ku kafung nuya wawa tiya fa'inayan.
S.PHON: maɾaɾitəmuk ʦaŋra mafijuk nu faɾi nu kaɾaɾitəmuk nira ku kafuŋ nuja wawa tija faʡinajan.
S.FORM: malalitemuk cangra mafiyuk nu fali nu kalalitemuk nira ku kafung nuya wawa tiya fa'inayan.
S.PHON: maɾaɾitəmuk ʦaŋra mafijuk nu faɾi nu kaɾaɾitəmuk nira ku kafuŋ nuja wawa tija faʡinajan.
S.TRANSL: 他們交會的時候,忽然一陣風把那個男孩的帽子吹走了.
When they met, the wind blew the boy's hat away.

S.FORM: matefad ku kafung nira.
S.PHON: matəfaɬ~ɮ ku kafuŋ nira.
S.FORM: matefad ku kafung nira.
S.PHON: matəfaɬ~ɮ ku kafuŋ nira.
S.TRANSL: 他的帽子掉下來.
His hat fell.

S.FORM: tala dadama cingra tu kafung nira tu sakatefadaw nuya kafung nira haw.
S.PHON: taɾa ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮama ʦiŋra tu kafuŋ nira tu sakatəfaɬ~ɮaw nuja kafuŋ nira ħaw.
S.FORM: tala dadama cingra tu kafung nira tu sakatefadaw nuya kafung nira haw.
S.PHON: taɾa ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮama ʦiŋra tu kafuŋ nira tu sakatəfaɬ~ɮaw nuja kafuŋ nira ħaw.
S.TRANSL: 帽子就快要掉下來了,所以他扶住他的帽子.
His hat was going to fall down soon, so he grasped it.

S.FORM: paci'ci sa'an matefad kiya kafung nira.
S.PHON: paʦiʡʦi saʡan matəfaɬ~ɮ kija kafuŋ nira.
S.FORM: paci'ci sa'an matefad kiya kafung nira.
S.PHON: paʦiʡʦi saʡan matəfaɬ~ɮ kija kafuŋ nira.

TRANSL.notes: 如此努力,帽子(還是)掉下來.

S.TRANSL: 如此努力,帽子 掉下來.
Even though he tried hard, his hat still fell down.

S.FORM: ca'aytu pina'on cingra minengneng tu aayaw.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajtu pinaʡo~un ʦiŋra minəŋnəŋ tu aajaw.
S.FORM: ca'aytu pina'on cingra minengneng tu aayaw.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajtu pinaʡo~un ʦiŋra minəŋnəŋ tu aajaw.
S.TRANSL: 他不能注意看著前方.
He could not look at the front attentively.

S.FORM: ira ku fekeloh i aayaw tahastul satu kuya kuliciw nira tuya fekeloh.
S.PHON: ira ku fəkəɾo~uħ i aajaw taħastuɾ satu kuja kuɾiʦiw nira tuja fəkəɾo~uħ.
S.FORM: ira ku fekeloh i aayaw tahastul satu kuya kuliciw nira tuya fekeloh.
S.PHON: ira ku fəkəɾo~uħ i aajaw taħastuɾ satu kuja kuɾiʦiw nira tuja fəkəɾo~uħ.
S.TRANSL: 前面有一塊石頭,腳踏車撞上那顆石頭.
There was a stone in the front, and the bike hit the stone.

S.FORM: pulin sa'an a mapulin kuya wawa.
S.PHON: puɾin saʡan a mapuɾin kuja wawa.
S.FORM: pulin sa'an a mapulin kuya wawa.
S.PHON: puɾin saʡan a mapuɾin kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩突然跌倒.
The child fell down.

S.FORM: ta adada ku wa'ay nira.
S.PHON: ta aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ku waʡaj nira.
S.FORM: ta adada ku wa'ay nira.
S.PHON: ta aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa ku waʡaj nira.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳很痛.
His foot hurt.

S.FORM: laklak satu kuya nasi tiya langa matapulung tuni kapulin nira.
S.PHON: ɾakɾak satu kuja nasi tija ɾaŋa matapuɾuŋ tuni kapuɾin nira.
S.FORM: laklak satu kuya nasi tiya langa matapulung tuni kapulin nira.
S.PHON: ɾakɾak satu kuja nasi tija ɾaŋa matapuɾuŋ tuni kapuɾin nira.
S.TRANSL: 在他摔倒的時候,籃子裡的梨子全部傾倒散落滿地.
The pears in the basket were scattered all over when he fell down.

S.FORM: misapuhpuhpuh tuya wa'ay nira.
S.PHON: misapuħpuħpuħ tuja waʡaj nira.
S.FORM: misapuhpuhpuh tuya wa'ay nira.
S.PHON: misapuħpuħpuħ tuja waʡaj nira.
S.TRANSL: 他撫摸他的腳.
He stroked his foot.

S.FORM: ca'aytu pakaluwad kuya wawa.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajtu pakaɾuwaɬ~ɮ kuja wawa.
S.FORM: ca'aytu pakaluwad kuya wawa.
S.PHON: ʦaʡajtu pakaɾuwaɬ~ɮ kuja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩無法爬起身來.
The child could not get up.

S.FORM: honi ira ku tatulu a sakalecad tunira a wawa tatulu ra'udhan nuya tatuluay.
S.PHON: ħo~uni ira ku tatuɾu a sakaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ tunira a wawa tatuɾu raʡuɬ~ɮħan nuja tatuɾuaj.
S.FORM: honi ira ku tatulu a sakalecad tunira a wawa tatulu ra'udhan nuya tatuluay.
S.PHON: ħo~uni ira ku tatuɾu a sakaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ tunira a wawa tatuɾu raʡuɬ~ɮħan nuja tatuɾuaj.
S.TRANSL: 沒多久,有三個跟他一樣大的小孩,那三個人靠近他.
After a while, there were three children who were as old as he. The three approached him.

S.FORM: u ta tayra mitafsiw tuya mipitpitay kuya tatuluay a wawa mitatuy tu mali.
S.PHON: u ta tajra mitafsiw tuja mipitpitaj kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa mitatuj tu maɾi.
S.FORM: u ta tayra mitafsiw tuya mipitpitay kuya tatuluay a wawa mitatuy tu mali.
S.PHON: u ta tajra mitafsiw tuja mipitpitaj kuja tatuɾuaj a wawa mitatuj tu maɾi.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩將經過摘水果的,他們拿著球.
The three children passed the person who plucked fruit and they carried balls.

S.FORM: padanghan nira mipadang mipudpud tuya nasi miparu itira i langa.
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮaŋħan nira mipaɬ~ɮaŋ mipuɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ tuja nasi miparu itira i ɾaŋa.
S.FORM: padanghan nira mipadang mipudpud tuya nasi miparu itira i langa.
S.PHON: paɬ~ɮaŋħan nira mipaɬ~ɮaŋ mipuɬ~ɮpuɬ~ɮ tuja nasi miparu itira i ɾaŋa.
S.TRANSL: 他幫忙撿梨子,裝在籃子裡.
He helped pick up the pears and put them in the basket.

S.FORM: ta lumuwadtu kuya mapulinay a wawa.
S.PHON: ta ɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu kuja mapuɾinaj a wawa.
S.FORM: ta lumuwadtu kuya mapulinay a wawa.
S.PHON: ta ɾumuwaɬ~ɮtu kuja mapuɾinaj a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那個跌倒的小孩起來了.
The child who fell down got up.

S.FORM: ta patadu han nuya tatuluay a mipakalic itira i kuliciw nira.
S.PHON: ta pataɬ~ɮu ħan nuja tatuɾuaj a mipakaɾiʦ itira i kuɾiʦiw nira.
S.FORM: ta patadu han nuya tatuluay a mipakalic itira i kuliciw nira.
S.PHON: ta pataɬ~ɮu ħan nuja tatuɾuaj a mipakaɾiʦ itira i kuɾiʦiw nira.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人協助他放到他的腳踏車上.

TRANSL.notes: The three helped him put (the pears) onto his bike.

S.TRANSL: The three helped him put onto his bike.

S.FORM: ta milaliwtu kuya wawa a minukay.
S.PHON: ta miɾaɾiwtu kuja wawa a minukaj.
S.FORM: ta milaliwtu kuya wawa a minukay.
S.PHON: ta miɾaɾiwtu kuja wawa a minukaj.
S.TRANSL: 之後,那個小孩就離開回家了.
Then, the child left and went home.

S.FORM: ya tatuluay satu tayratu i katayraan nira.
S.PHON: ja tatuɾuaj satu tajratu i katajraan nira.
S.FORM: ya tatuluay satu tayratu i katayraan nira.
S.PHON: ja tatuɾuaj satu tajratu i katajraan nira.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人呢,要去他們的目的地.
The three went towards their destination.

S.FORM: mitafsiw turira lalan tuya pipitpitan nuya tamdaw tu nasi.
S.PHON: mitafsiw turira ɾaɾan tuja pipitpitan nuja tamɬ~ɮaw tu nasi.
S.FORM: mitafsiw turira lalan tuya pipitpitan nuya tamdaw tu nasi.
S.PHON: mitafsiw turira ɾaɾan tuja pipitpitan nuja tamɬ~ɮaw tu nasi.
S.TRANSL: 經過那條路,那個人在摘梨子的那一條路.
They went past the road where the person was plucking pears.

S.FORM: ma'pud kuya mipitpitay tu nasi.
S.PHON: maʡpuɬ~ɮ kuja mipitpitaj tu nasi.
S.FORM: ma'pud kuya mipitpitay tu nasi.
S.PHON: maʡpuɬ~ɮ kuja mipitpitaj tu nasi.
S.TRANSL: 摘水果的人下來.
The person who was plucking pears went down.

S.FORM: nengenghan nira ccaytu kuya matumusay a langa tu nasi awaho ku paru niya ccay.
S.PHON: nəŋəŋħan nira ʦʦajtu kuja matumusaj a ɾaŋa tu nasi awaħo~u ku paru nija ʦʦaj.
S.FORM: nengenghan nira ccaytu kuya matumusay a langa tu nasi awaho ku paru niya ccay.
S.PHON: nəŋəŋħan nira ʦʦajtu kuja matumusaj a ɾaŋa tu nasi awaħo~u ku paru nija ʦʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 他看,只有一個籃子裝滿梨子,一個籃子沒有裝.
He saw only one basket was filled with pears, and one basket was not full.

S.FORM: icuwa satu kuya ccay sa'an cingra a misaharaterateng.
S.PHON: iʦuwa satu kuja ʦʦaj saʡan ʦiŋra a misaħaratəratəŋ.
S.FORM: icuwa satu kuya ccay sa'an cingra a misaharaterateng.
S.PHON: iʦuwa satu kuja ʦʦaj saʡan ʦiŋra a misaħaratəratəŋ.
S.TRANSL: 一個籃子到哪去了呢?他不斷的想.
Where was one basket? He kept thinking.

S.FORM: ira kiya mitafsiway tiya tatuluay nengnenghan nira awa ku ma'an nuya tatuluay.
S.PHON: ira kija mitafsiwaj tija tatuɾuaj nəŋnəŋħan nira awa ku maʡan nuja tatuɾuaj.
S.FORM: ira kiya mitafsiway tiya tatuluay nengnenghan nira awa ku ma'an nuya tatuluay.
S.PHON: ira kija mitafsiwaj tija tatuɾuaj nəŋnəŋħan nira awa ku maʡan nuja tatuɾuaj.

TRANSL.notes: 路過的那三個人,他一看,沒有什麼(特別的).

S.TRANSL: 路過的那三個人,他一看,沒有什麼 .

TRANSL.notes: He found the three people who passed nothing (special).

S.TRANSL: He found the three people who passed nothing .

S.FORM: u mali mitatuyan nangra tafsiw sa'an kiya tatuluay.
S.PHON: u maɾi mitatujan naŋra tafsiw saʡan kija tatuɾuaj.
S.FORM: u mali mitatuyan nangra tafsiw sa'an kiya tatuluay.
S.PHON: u maɾi mitatujan naŋra tafsiw saʡan kija tatuɾuaj.

TRANSL.notes: 他們三個(只)拿著球經過.

S.TRANSL: 他們三個 拿著球經過.
They passed, carrying balls.

S.FORM: sa 'inga'ingaing satu misaingiingir kuya tamdaw a minengneng tuya nika awa nu ccay a langa nuya mipitpitan nira a nasi.
S.PHON: sa ʡiŋaʡiŋaiŋ satu misaiŋiiŋir kuja tamɬ~ɮaw a minəŋnəŋ tuja nika awa nu ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa nuja mipitpitan nira a nasi.
S.FORM: sa 'inga'ingaing satu misaingiingir kuya tamdaw a minengneng tuya nika awa nu ccay a langa nuya mipitpitan nira a nasi.
S.PHON: sa ʡiŋaʡiŋaiŋ satu misaiŋiiŋir kuja tamɬ~ɮaw a minəŋnəŋ tuja nika awa nu ʦʦaj a ɾaŋa nuja mipitpitan nira a nasi.
S.TRANSL: 那個人搖頭,歪著頭,看著沒有裝梨子的籃子.
That person shook his head. His head was lopsided, looking at the basket which not was filled with pears.
